race.comment: DRUMFIRE (3) was well placed in country-class and made an immediate impression when scoring on debut over 1000m at Muswellbrook, 17 days ago, showing good pace to sit in the open before pulling away for an easy win. He gets a big swing in his draw, and with Tim Clark picking up the ride, he can repeat the dose. UNDER FOCUS (2) also produced a strong debut performance when runner-up over 1000m at Warwick Farm 2 weeks ago when trying to make all the running, and with natural improvement, he looks capable of going end-to-end here. DON'T LOOK BACK (1) showed early speed and fought hard to score narrowly by a nose over 1100m at Gosford 11 days ago. He backs up quickly, and a 3kg claim puts him right in this. Each-way. HARRYBEGOOD (5) was third on debut behind the top pick in the same race, and he is a top 4 chance again.
